name: delete_user_profile_photo
description: Deletes the slack profile photo for the user identified by the token, reverting them to the default avatar; this action is irreversible and succeeds even if no custom photo was set.

token.description:
Authentication token identifying the user whose profile photo will be deleted.
Example: "xoxp-YOUR_SLACK_LEGACY_TOKEN"

arguments.description: Input for deleting a user's profile photo.
